items.title: Watch: Runners v robots at China half marathon
items.dek: Robots competed in a half marathon race in Beijing on Sunday, with the winning machine leaving its human rivals for dust.
items.body: Robots competed in a half marathon race in Beijing on Sunday, with the winning machine leaving its human rivals for dust.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Bodies of 50 infants dumped at Trinidad graveyard
items.dek: Police say a preliminary investigation shows it may be a case of an "unlawful disposal of unclaimed corpses".
items.body: Police say a preliminary investigation shows it may be a case of an "unlawful disposal of unclaimed corpses".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Australia's most-decorated soldier vows to 'fight' war crime charges
items.dek: Ben Roberts-Smith has given his first statement since he was charged with five counts of the war crime of murder last week.
items.body: Ben Roberts-Smith has given his first statement since he was charged with five counts of the war crime of murder last week.
items.author: IriLine Desk
